replies.msg: 連登只會叫人讀醫，其他AH 都係垃圾

easy，肯定係澳洲放射。

澳洲生活物價發展>英國
放射易搵工過藥劑

你自己都揀咗啦仲喺度問做乜姐
要去就去啦
唔好喺度問
不過記得做足功課喎

英國行頭唔知好唔好，但係讀藥劑多數有3條路
1. 醫院 （最多人掙）
2. 藥廠 （唔一定要有藥劑牌）
3. 藥房

3個做嘅嘢都好唔同，但係做藥房唔做老闆幫人打一世工好難出頭囉。

放射以前都有諗過讀但係入唔到，感覺上pathway 比較單一 （therapy/diagnostics), 算係唔洗諗咁多但係都係個healthcare professional

利： 澳洲醫院藥劑，投多次胎點都唔讀藥劑

藥劑冇工開

睇你為興趣定前途

pharm 飽飽地和
好多國家都係咁

replies.msg: 喺香港冇醫藥分家先飽和得咁嚴重姐

樓主係咁推po

replies.msg:
樓主我再重申，藥劑呢科係very very overrated。咩pharmacy係弱版醫科就算啦，放射反而先係真專科。

我唔理你鍾意英國定係澳洲，藥劑呢行根本係超級飽和。你成績top 20%最後都可能肯mk藥房執藥，plus the fact that英國藥劑俾香港更飽和，香港至少有機會入公營醫療體系。

你要問清楚自己嘅:
(1) 未來事業方向 (讀放射/藥劑之後係可以再進修嘅）
(2) 就業難度 (radio easier)
(3) 移民難度 (radio easier)
(4) 學業難度 (radio = pharm)
(5) 穩intern難度 (radio easier)

我可能好subjective，你自己搵資料再同人地意見比較下。

replies.msg:
But I don’t think pharm is in any supermacy to other allied health
Eg. PT do need to learn physical exam skills, history taking skills and some image interpretation in advanced role, as well as the therapeutic techniques

I would rather say pharm is border and more general in terms of the speciality they have learnt, while the other allied health have a much deeper understanding in several specific specialities

Put it simply, that is pharm being a generalist, but not as good as GP
While other AH are specialist, but don’t know much about other speciality

讀左藥劑就覺得醫生都流流地，成日要mon住佢地阻止佢地開錯藥

但人工又唔夠醫生好
待遇地位全部低一等

出左去又難搵工
早知勤力啲入medic好過 或者做物理治療都好過藥劑

出面私營市場PT fatfat

quote.msg: 此回覆已被刪除

But I don’t think pharm is in any supermacy to other allied health
Eg. PT do need to learn physical exam skills, history taking skills and some image interpretation in advanced role, as well as the therapeutic techniques

I would rather say pharm is border and more general in terms of the speciality they have learnt, while the other allied health have a much deeper understanding in several specific specialities

Put it simply, that is pharm being a generalist, but not as good as GP
While other AH are specialist, but don’t know much about other speciality
